spoons.author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.description: Seconds the pointer must rest over a window before focus is changed.
config.label: Focus delay

config.description: App names or bundle IDs whose windows should never be auto-focused.
config.label: Excluded apps

spoons.description: Sloppy focus / X11-style focus-follows-mouse: when the pointer comes to rest over a window that isn't focused, that window is focused.
spoons.name: FocusFollowsMouse

optionalModules.description: Focus-without-raise via macOS SkyLight private APIs. Works on Chromium-based PWAs where pure hs.window:focus() raises the window. Without it the Spoon falls back to win:focus().
optionalModules.name: hs._ckol.sloppyfocus

spoons.author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.description: Maximum milliseconds between two clicks for them to count as a double-click.
config.label: Double-click window

config.description: If on, middle-clicking inside a text field pastes the clipboard at the click point.
config.label: Enable middle-click paste

config.description: When on (default), copy-on-select fills a private buffer instead of the system clipboard (X11 PRIMARY model). Middle-click paste reads from this private buffer. Off = legacy shared-clipboard model.
config.label: Use private selection buffer

config.description: Minimum cursor movement before a drag arms the copy-on-release. Prevents tiny accidental drags from triggering a copy.
config.label: Drag threshold

config.description: Milliseconds to wait after a middle-click paste before restoring the real clipboard. Only used when the private selection buffer is enabled.
config.label: Clipboard restore delay

config.description: Microseconds to wait after the synthesised focus-click before the paste keystroke.
config.label: Paste focus-click delay

config.description: Additional microseconds slept before the Cmd+V keystroke is issued.
config.label: Paste typing delay

spoons.description: X11-style copy-on-select for macOS. Releasing the mouse after dragging across text — or double-clicking a word — copies the selection automatically. Optional middle-click paste.
spoons.name: MouseCopyPasteSelection

spoons.author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.description: Flip the vertical mouse-wheel direction, independent of the system Natural-scrolling toggle.
config.label: Invert vertical scroll

config.description: Flip the horizontal (tilt-wheel) direction.
config.label: Invert horizontal scroll

config.description: Smoothing intensity (0 = passthrough, only inversion applies). Mid grades (5–10) feel subtle; 10–15 approximates mac-mouse-fix; 15–20 leans into long glides.
config.label: Smoothness

spoons.description: Per-axis scroll inversion and optional smoothing for traditional mouse wheels (trackpads / Magic Mouse pass through untouched).
spoons.name: MouseScrollTweaks

optionalModules.description: Posts continuous-scroll CGEvents from a CVDisplayLink — the same shape macOS trackpads emit, so receiving apps treat the whole momentum tail as one logical scroll. Without it the Spoon falls back to an inline pure-Lua smoothing engine.
optionalModules.name: hs._ckol.smoothscroll

spoons.author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.description: Flip vertical scroll for the Magic Mouse only. Trackpad scrolling is unaffected.
config.label: Invert Magic Mouse vertical scroll

config.description: Flip horizontal scroll for the Magic Mouse only.
config.label: Invert Magic Mouse horizontal scroll

fields.description: Only count touches that began this recently before the click. Filters resting contacts from a Magic Mouse grip.
fields.label: Max finger age

spoons.description: Per-device input tweaks: Magic-Mouse-only scroll inversion, and middle-click synthesis from multi-finger or top-center touches on Magic Mouse / Trackpad.
spoons.name: MouseTrackpadTweaks

optionalModules.description: Streams per-touch events (finger count, surface position, phase) from Magic Mouse / Trackpad via Apple's private MultitouchSupport framework. Unlocks scroll inversion and middle-click synthesis. Without it the Spoon loads cleanly with those features disabled.
optionalModules.name: hs._ckol.multitouch

spoons.author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.description: If on (default), the viewer follows the window to its new Space — like moving a window between workspaces on Linux. Off snaps the view back after the move.
config.label: Follow window

config.description: If on, moving past the leftmost/rightmost Space wraps around to the opposite end. Off (default) is a silent no-op at edges.
config.label: Wrap at edges

config.description: If on (default), fullscreen-app Spaces are stepped over when looking for the destination Space.
config.label: Skip fullscreen Spaces

spoons.description: Move the focused window to the macOS Space immediately to the left or right of the current Space, on the same screen.

knownIssues.description: Apple's WindowServer in macOS 26 (Sonoma's successor track) gates cross-process Space moves at the system level. hs.spaces.moveWindowToSpace silently no-ops for most windows, and the Ctrl+arrow drag fallback also stops working reliably. Install the optional hs._ckol.movetospace native helper for the best chance of moving windows — though on macOS 26.5 even the helper only moves Hammerspoon's own windows.
knownIssues.title: Limited on macOS 26+

spoons.name: MoveSpaces

optionalModules.description: Moves windows to a specific Space via SkyLight private APIs. Bypasses hs.spaces.moveWindowToSpace, which silently no-ops on macOS 26+ for most windows. Without it the Spoon falls back to a Ctrl+arrow drag simulation.
optionalModules.name: hs._ckol.movetospace

spoons.author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.description: Substrings (case-insensitive) matched against audio device names. Devices that match are treated as 'headphones' for play/pause logic and as auto-switch candidates.
config.label: Preferred audio devices

config.description: On audio device list changes, switch the default output to the first available preferred device.
config.label: Auto-switch audio output

config.description: Only auto-resume on screen wake if this Spoon was the one that paused Spotify (i.e. user didn't manually pause).
config.label: Respect manual pause

config.description: Show a menubar item with 'Pause Spotify for N hours' entries.
config.label: Show menubar dropdown

config.description: Number of hour entries offered in the menubar dropdown (1..N).
config.label: Pause-hours entries

config.description: Speak transitions (pause / resume / arm / expire) via hs.speech.
config.label: Spoken feedback

spoons.description: Auto play/pause Spotify based on screen state and audio output device. Pauses when headphones disconnect or screen sleeps; resumes on wake. Includes a 'pause for N hours' menubar item.
spoons.name: SpotifyPlayPause

spoons.author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.description: Hold these modifiers and left-drag anywhere in a window to move it, right-drag to resize the closest edge.
config.label: Drag modifier

config.description: Focus and raise the target window at the start of each drag.
config.label: Raise window first

spoons.description: Modifier + mouse drag to move/resize the focused window from anywhere in its rect — no need to aim for the title bar or a corner.
spoons.name: MouseMoveResizeWindows
